text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I<n>hear some
students' voices.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck's going on here?! This<n>stuff's
totally in our way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they were used for an event?<n>But there
are so many of them...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I see a huge pile of boxes stacked in<n>front of
them. It looks like the boxes<n>are blocking the
way.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! If we don't do something<n>about this
we'll be late for class!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to blow them away<n>with magic!
Here goes nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Raging torrent, wash away all in our<n>way!
Chrysanthemum ☆ Splash!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sparkles from the heavens, drive<n>away all in our
sight! Oxypetalum ☆<n>Blue Star!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hey, nothing's happening!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: B-be quiet! I just need to warm up is<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: All right, it's time for a hero to stepup! It's time for me to step up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! I'm not ready to step<n>down!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to work up to this, but it<n>looks like I've
got no choice. Here<n>comes my ultimate
incantation!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho waves her wand. I<n>have a feeling
things are about to get<n>magical—no, physical!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! This is the magic my<n>granny
always used to cast when she<n>got into a fight
with my gramps!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ULTIMATE IMPACT!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BOOM! THWUMP! CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She may be small, but she packs a<n>punch!
Dozens of boxes are flattened<n>in the blink of an
eye!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Nice job, Sweep! Now we can<n>waltz on
through!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everything's a breeze when<n>you've got a
genius magical girl by<n>your side! ♪ I wanna cast
that magic<n>again...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Crap, look at the time! We've gotta<n>get to class!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll clean it up later with magic! Come<n>on you two,
we need to book it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They rush away... I know Sweep<n>Tosho said
she'd clean it up later, but<n>I'd hate to leave such
a mess.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I decide to clean it up before anyone<n>else comes
along.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, now let's get back to—huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Everything's been tidied up! I<n>must have
performed some<n>subconscious magic!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey! Just what do you think you're<n>all doing?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yikes! We've been spotted!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Flower! Biko! We've gotta escape<n>while we can!
We still have time to<n>outrun her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Tch, they got away. Hey you, do you<n>know what
happened here?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain the situation to Air Groove<n>and
apologize for letting Sweep Tosho<n>destroy the
boxes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. Looks like you got played by<n>that naughty
girl.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that does make you complicit.<n>And you'll
need to take responsibility<n>for your actions.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I agree to Air Groove's terms and set<n>about
cleaning diligently by myself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear later that Sweep Tosho and the<n>others
were also given a very stern<n>lecture.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Why are you trying to stop me?!
choice_data_list: Your ultimate incantation is too powerful.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, you're right. There's no telling<n>what'll
happen when I set it off.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, fine. I'll try a different type of<n>magic then.
♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's time for a command spell!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Cirsium ☆ Oxalis ☆ Iris! I command<n>you two to
clean up these boxes!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Flower, I've folded the<n>cardboard! What's
next?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Tie them up with string. Here, take<n>this end of it
and...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, that'd be great! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The three of us get to work cleaning<n>up the
boxes. However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
How come you're all having such a<n>blast?!
You're being forced to clean<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So it's come to this, has it?! I'm<n>gonna have to
show you how it's<n>done! Hand me that!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Feeling lonely as she watches us<n>from the
sidelines, Sweep Tosho ends<n>up joining in too.
